_comment: Per-pattern overrides for scribe input generation. Top-level keys are regex patterns matched (re.search) against the intrinsic name; values map parameter names to scalars (immediates) or lists (vector / pointer buffers). Lists are truncated to the per-variant lane count and cycled if shorter; multiple matching patterns merge in declaration order with later entries winning. Underscore-prefixed keys (like _comment) are ignored.
